text:
Darkness flowers (ダークネスの花), or simply called darkness (ダークネス), Hunter × Hunter: Each One's Determination are a type of plant exclusive to the video game Hunter × Hunter: Each One's Determination. It appears in Leorio's route.

Appearance

Darkness flowers are a rare plant found in swamps. They bear black stems and leaves. The buds themselves are white-pink with yellow seeds within. They typically have seven petals. It is implied they glow in the dark. 

Plot

Each One's Determination

 Note: Events occurring in Each One's Determination don't constitute canon material. 

While Leorio visits Hari the second time, he questions the nurse on her condition. Said nurse claims that they had finished examining her eyes. They concluded that whatever caused her eye problems may be due to a rare plant containing paralytic poison. Said plant is called 'darkness.' Once Leorio is done visiting, he decides to ask around town for any information regarding the plant. If he attempts to ask about it at a local drugstore without further information, the clerk will lie about not knowing anything about the 'dangerous' plant. 

After wandering around, the med student decides to go to a local Cyber Cafe. Looking it up results in him finding a medical website. Said site states that darkness plants, even on a small scale, can deprive anyone of their vision. They may also cause fatigue. Typical treatments may take up to a year as it is extremely rare and requires the sub-species of darkness flowers. These flowers typically cost over 10 million Jenny due to illegal cultivation of any darkness plants. 

At the local drugstore, Leorio attempts to ask about darkness flowers specifically. The clerk asks if he is a hunter. She then tells him to head to one of the alleys where an informant will be. She instructs him to sit down, have a drink, and reply with the password 'harakiri.' He instead hears 'haraheri,' which has the informant hit him. Once Leorio explains what he is looking for, he is told to head for a bar on the main street. He ends up eavesdropping on a conversation between the bartender and a hunter. The two discuss how the sign-out front requires Nen to read. This has Leorio completely forget about the flowers and instead focus on the Madan's Book. 

Once Leorio properly learns Nen thanks to Hari, the duo decide to read the Madan's Book together. Here, they learn that the flowers can be found at Milsy Wetlands. Thus, Leorio decides to travel there. While wandering the area, he soon comes across an area of the swamp where the water is completely blacked out. As he approaches, he notices a nearby flower. He then takes it and heads back to the hospital. There, he gives one of the nurses it. He asks that it be used to help cure Hari. Said nurse reluctantly agrees. From this, Hari begins undergoing treatment as Leorio leaves.
